text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just before the Yasuda Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's enthusiasm for her training
only grows the closer we get to Yasuda Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: 'Course I am! I'm in top form!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've never been more on fire than I am right now,
but that's no surprise!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
After all, Oguri's the strongest racer there is!
There's no way I can beat her unless I push past
my limits and train till I drop!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Don't be afraid to turn the heat up to eleven,
Trainer! I'm not even starting to feel tired yet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her unwavering optimism leaves me in stunned
admiration. And she's right—Oguri Cap's about as
tough as an opponent can get, and we'll have to
train hard to defeat her!
choice_data_list: All right! Let's turn up the heat!
All right! Let's turn up the heat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That's what I'm talking about!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I've got to make sure to thank Oguri! If it
wasn't for her, I would never have been able to
get so fired up!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh! I get it now!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I think I know how to talk to Yaeno! And not just
through my running—I think I can put it into
words too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Yasuda Kinen is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
I'm so excited to see Oguri win today! It never
gets old!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Will we be able to see Oguri from here, Daddy?
Can you take a picture when she crosses the finish
line?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Show everyone you're the best at miles too,
Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for the Yasuda Kinen to start. I
can't believe Bamboo and Yaeno are running with
Oguri.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
After today's race, you, Yaeno, and I ought to
know where we stand in this generation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm sure Bamboo will be able to show us...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I agree. I believe that she will reveal to us today
what we lost sight of long ago.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Let's have a good race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... She has an even more oppressive aura than
before.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Just how much stronger has she gotten?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wooow! Oguri's in tip-top form today! Dang, I
didn't expect anything less from her, but still!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: You're not scared, Bamboo?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, she's definitely putting out some pretty
scary vibes, but that's how you know she's the real
deal!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Let's have a great race today, Yaeno! I'm going to
give you a race you won't soon forget!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: All right. I'm gonna go say hi to Oguri too. See ya!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bamboo, wai—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hey, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, Bamboo.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I've been looking forward to running with you
fooooorrrever!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But I'm here to win, so I'm going to throw
everything I've got into this race! Let's have a
great race!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'm looking forward to it. And don't worry,
I'm throwing my all into this race too. Let's do our
best.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...!
All right!
